problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
